questions.question: Compare and contrast Hyperledger Fabric and Corda. How do their architectures differ?
questions.hint: Highlight key differences in architecture, consensus mechanisms, and application use cases

questions.question: Describe the key benefits of using Sawtooth Lake for state management in a blockchain network. How does it address common issues in traditional state storage?
questions.hint: Focus on advantages of self-healing state, scalability, and fault tolerance

questions.question: Explain the concept of Hyperledger Fabric's in-chain and out-of-chain (XCC) components. How do these components interact with each other?
questions.hint: Highlight the role of the XCC in facilitating cross-chain transactions and the importance of in-chain components in maintaining network security
